description: Phase 10 T8: SDOT Kernel4x16 K-tail branch hoist. Split the inner k-loop into a branchless K_main (K&~3, unconditional 4-byte activation load) + a zero-padded tail. Removed LoadA4's per-k call+branch+stack-fallback from the hot SDOT pipe. Apple M3 Pro.

sdot_microbench_ms_before_after.delta: ~15-24% faster across all d1280 SDOT shapes; stable across repeats (not thermal)

e2e_650m_uniform_8x256_p50_ms.note: T6 (attention PV) + T8 (SDOT hoist) stacked. GEMM bucket per profile: fc1 595->497, fc2 589->509, qkv 452->392, out 149->131. vs HF eager 3879ms -> 1.79x (P9 was 1.30x). Both are certain, cross-checked, pure-NEON wins that also help Graviton/Linux ARM.

correctness: GemmShapes (incl NeonDotProd/NeonI8mm dispatch) + full ctest 125/125 green; INT8 tolerance rtol=1e-3 atol=1 unchanged.
